Social Media: For Parents (COVID-19) 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this social media carousel and sample messages to encourage parents to take action to protect their child from severe illness from respiratory viruses, such COVID-19. Available in English and Spanish.
Format: PNG Dimensions: 1080 x 1080 pixels Language: English (US) Size: 302 KB Length: Last updated: August 18, 2025
